==Pokémon==
This listing is of Silver's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}}.
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Silver
|pkmn=Chikorita
|type1=Grass
|img=Silver Chikorita.png
|epnum=HS18
|epname=The Search for the Legend
|vajp=Rikako Aikawa
|vaen=Rikako Aikawa
|desc={{p|Chikorita}} appears to be Silver's favorite Pokémon. Much like {{AP|Pikachu}} and [[Sparky]], it spends most of its time [[walking Pokémon|outside of its Poké Ball]] and riding on its Trainer's shoulder.

Chikorita's known moves are {{m|Razor Leaf}} and {{m|Vine Whip}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Silver
|pkmn=Salamence
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Flying
|img=Silver Salamence.png
|epnum=HS18
|epname=The Search for the Legend
|desc={{p|Salamence}} is Silver's main battler. It was able to scare four {{p|Gyarados}} with one {{m|Hyper Beam}} and was used in the battle against {{p|Moltres}}.

Salamence's known moves are {{m|Hyper Beam}}, {{m|Dragon Breath}}, {{m|Dragon Claw}}, and {{m|Double Team}}.}}
